name: the Layer-2 emitter renders a tool's native TOML config (ruff.toml) from the tool-native options
command: p=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool ruff --options '{"lint.ignore":["F401"]}' --out cfg 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$p" ] && grep -q 'lint.ignore = \["F401"\]' "$p" && echo emitter-renders-toml 1>&2
